chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | May 16, 2025 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the EECS department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements, events, and resources relevant to their academic and professional development.

The newsletter covers various topics such as upcoming events, faculty announcements, and student opportunities. It aims to keep students informed about department news and support their engagement within the EECS community.

This edition is dated May 16, 2025, and is part of the regular communication from the EECS department. It serves as a key resource for undergraduates to stay updated on important deadlines, workshops, and other departmental activities.
